mapper.insert: INSERT INTO refresh_tokens (user_id, token_hash, user_agent, ip, expired_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{tokenHash}, #{userAgent}, #{ip}, #{expiredAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE refresh_tokens SET revoked_at = #{revokedAt} WHERE id = #{id} AND revoked_at IS NULL
UPDATE refresh_tokens SET revoked_at = #{revokedAt} WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND revoked_at IS NULL
